overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a character walking through a traditional East Asian-inspired street at night. The scene features ornate wooden buildings with balconies, warm paper lanterns contrasting against a deep blue night sky, and scattered NPC pedestrians. The camera maintains a steady forward trajectory down the cobblestone street.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional wooden street with hanging lanterns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow historic street lined with traditional wooden buildings on both sides. Warm red lanterns illuminate the cobblestone path while a distant tower looms at the end of the street. Around the 8-second mark, the camera overtakes an NPC pedestrian dressed in blue robes walking along the right sidewalk. The night sky is visible above the building rooftops, creating a cool blue contrast with the warm artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward trajectory through a narrow historic street that leads toward a looming distant tower. It begins by gliding along a cobblestone path lined with traditional wooden buildings, where warm red lanterns cast a glow against the deep blue of the night sky. As the camera advances, it smoothly overtakes a pedestrian dressed in blue robes walking along the right sidewalk. The scene then continues its linear progression, maintaining the contrast between the cool overhead atmosphere and the warm artificial lighting of the architecture before drawing closer to the silhouette of the tower at the street's end.
